I'm actually going to do a little bit of a different section here that's not in the keynote that I just gave you in the Storybrand course, the online course. It's just called Who's the Market? It's another section I've created and feel free to go off script if you think you need a section. I just want to explain who would benefit from this because people like reading about themselves on websites. The more you can have somebody say, oh yeah, that's me. I am that guy, that's going to be really perfect. So again, more icons to continue making this a scannable document. So the three demographics, I'm just going to spell them out. Coaches just getting started, established coaches, agencies and corporations, then under each of those I'm going to include a little sentence. If you want to build a coaching business by taking clients through a proven marketing framework, our certification program will give you a foundation. That's great. Anybody who wants to become a coach and they're good at marketing advice, they can apply. Established coaches. So is this for me? I've already coaching, but I do executive coaching. I don't do marketing coaches. We just want to actually say, no, this is for you too. If you have an existing clientele and want to enhance your value by adding the Storybrand framework to your deliverables, our guide training will work. And then agencies and corporations. If you want to certify team members within your corporation, we can customize a plan for you. And then of course, we need to give them a plan. So the next section of the website, I'm going to spell out exactly how you can do this. And you just want to make this as clear as possible. We've done it. I normally like three steps to a plan. I normally would never go over four, but because I had a visual idea of what I wanted to do for my client here, I went with six. That's the most I've ever done is six, but I think it works. And you'll see visually what my designer did with it a little bit later. But it's a big ask. It's a $10,000 product. It has a $5,000 renewal every year. Again, probably we can make these people six figures, but it's a big ask. And so we wanted to put a lot of stones in the creek and really help people cross this. So first, fill out an application. Two, interview with the Storybrand representative. Three, attend the five-day immersive training. Four, launch your Storybrand consulting business or division. Five, receive online live and community support. And six, scale your business into the career of your dreams. You can see I've actually taken some of the benefits of the program and turned it into a step. So they know, yeah, I got to do this, but it gets me to this step six, which is the career of my dreams. And visually, I'm going to show you how this looked in a second. I think it really turned out well. Then I'm going to include another value proposition. And the reason I'm going to do this is because somebody paying $10,000 is probably going, man, that's a lot of money, and they're thinking about the expense. And I want to immediately counter that. And I'm going to say, don't think about the expense. Think about what this can actually make you. So I designed, or actually I wrote out a really clear path for them to get a return on their investment. And the first thing I want to do is I want to say, what do you get with certification? And that way they know they're getting quite a bit. So with the certification, they're getting $12,500 in existing story brand products. So we're literally giving them pretty much almost everything that we create they get. This is the pinnacle of our program. Then I'm actually going to spell that out. And I'm going to give my designer a bunch of bullet points that he will creatively turn into something beautiful. So now we've told them it's $12,500, and now I've spread it out over a bunch of bullet points so they can visually see it. I know this sounds really complicated, but you're going to get very good at this if you just keep watching this video and looking at some of the websites that have been created using the story brand framework. Then I'm going to have a final value proposition in which I spell it exactly what they can make if they become a story brand certified guide. How story brand certified guides get paid. If you have an existing clientele, you are likely already charging a monthly fee for your coaching. If not, story brand will give you a framework and a path that is worth between $300 and $1,000 per month per client, depending on your skill level. Here's a breakdown of how you can enhance your existing business or start a consulting business through the story brand guide certification program. And then I'm actually going to spell out the finances for them on what they can get paid for each part of the program. They can get between $300 and $1,000 a month for consulting per client. Commissions for selling story brand marketing workshop are $600. The online marketing workshop, the commission is $300. Commission for selling online story brand copywriting course is $600. Commissions for selling copywriting certification is $1,000. Commissions for selling story brand private workshop is actually $1,500. So if you build a coaching business that has 10 clients paying $600 per month and sell two units of each product each month, which basically means you're going to be working 40 hours because it's going to be tough, but you get $14,000 per month or approximately $168,000 per year. So that's kind of the high end possibility for a story brand certified guide. And what I wanted to do is I wanted to spell it out so they know, yes, it's $10,000, but if you're really good and you work really hard and you're devoted to 10 clients, well, also being a representative to send other people to various story brand workshops, you can make a very good living doing this. And it's realistic, but I wanted to put that there because I'm offsetting the cost of the program. And then finally, I am just going to call them to action one final time. Now the reality is they've been called to action on every segment of the website. There's apply now buttons when I show it to you in a second visually all through it. But apply now is the direct call to action. Watch the video is our transitional call to action. In the future, we will also include a pop up that's five things every marketing coach should know in exchange for an email address that will turn into an evergreen campaign that will honor people to the program. Right now the program is so popular, we can't do that. I'm realizing as I create this video that I've just tried to sell you on the story brand certified guide program. Not what we were trying to do, although you should probably do it if you haven't done it. Some of you have already done it and that's why you're watching this. But what I wanted to show you was the very latest site that we created. So we created this program, we mapped it out, I put together exactly what you're reading on this document, sent it to my designer, my designer created it. That was about a three week process. We had four paid customers within the first week of launching it. That's how quickly these things can go. And you have a plan and you know what you're doing and you know how to wire frame a website. This to me is a very good sales website. Now I reluctantly tell you this because I'm afraid every website is going to use our copy. Make yours unique, customize it. Don't copy us exactly. Really fine tune it for whatever product that you're trying to create. Now let me show you the end result of how beautiful this website turned out. Now walking through why I like it so much. So you can see you got a smiling happy person. You know how much I love smiling happy people. You got, it looks like a consulting thing going on here and the marketing coach everybody wants become a story brand certified guy. You can see it passes the grunt test right away and then become a master marketing coach, add value to your coaching, help clients clarify their message. You can see how it looks. You need to be able to see in your head how it looks while you're typing the text for the wire frame. And I know how many words I can use because I've just kind of figured it out, but you want to visually understand it. And if it helps, you might want to actually take a big piece of butcher paper or a white board and wire frame it word for word as you're creating product for your client. Then you scroll down the story brand difference, join the best, have an impact, earn more. And again, here's my direct call to action apply now. Let me actually go back up here for a second. I want to show something. Here's the story brand certified guide. Here's our logo. Here's the apply now button. Here's another apply now button. Notice what's not there. Frequently asked questions, contact us, employment opportunities. All that needs to go down in the juncture. I don't give people who are browsing this website much more information than I got a great thing and I want you to buy it, right? So we scroll down, we see the story brand difference, join the best, have an impact, earn more. And again, don't underestimate the power of these visuals. You don't have to use icons, but some sort of way for people to scan a website and really understand the value right away. Here's my how does it work paragraph. But notice if I don't want to read this, I can just scan right over it. But if I want to read it, I just click continue reading and here it all is. The website or the paragraphs that we wrote earlier. And even inside of this paragraph, there's a call to action and a call to action. In that section, who should become a story brand guide? And there's my three segment and customers. Coaches just getting started, established coaches, agencies and corporations. And a little paragraph under each of those. Notice bold and then the paragraphs so that people can either scan or read your website. And don't you love the apply now button? You want to get that direct call to action everywhere you can. Look at what my designer did with my six different steps on the plan. He created a path, how to become a story brand guide, fill out an application, interview with a story brand representative, attend the five day immersive training, launch your story brand consulting business, receive online live community support, and scale your business into the career of your dreams and of course apply now. Mapping that out as a path makes it much easier for people to do business with your client or with you. And so you really want to get that path really solid. Now here's my value proposition. What you get with certification. And here's where I spell out you get $12,500 worth of products. And then I actually show you in bullet point all the things that you get. And I might even come back and put the value of each of these things in parentheses to just spell it out even further and make it even more clear. Once again, the apply now button. How story brand certified guides get paid? Once again, another value proposition, trying to offset that sticker shock of $10,000. And here's how much money that they can make and then apply now. And of course the application at the bottom and the junk drawer at the very bottom. That's it. There's not a whole lot to this website, but don't kid yourself. This took a lot of thought, a lot of strategy, a lot of time answering what do I want people to feel when they leave it? What am I trying to accomplish? Who am I trying to talk to? And then spelling that out took a good bit of time to create this website. I want to show you one more thing. Apply now. One, two, three, four, actually five up here. Six, seven, eight, nine times. No other link. There are nine direct calls to action before I even get to any other possibility of clicking anything else. That is a simple, clear website that already has converted for us and a simple, clear website will convert for you and for your clients too. But that is how you wireframe a website in a page document or a Word document, send it to a designer and work with them to create a sales page that will work.
